# JDK-8343500: Optimize ArrayClassDescImpl computeDescriptor

> **PR**: [21860](https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/21860) | **Author**: wenshao | **Status**: merged

## Summary

A small improvement to ArrayClassDescImpl#computeDescriptor that avoids intermediate object allocation in the common rank 1 scenario.
